overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay showing approach to a traditional wooden mountain sanctuary. The player ascends stone stairs and enters a dimly lit wooden corridor with dramatic backlighting from the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain temple courtyard with stone paving

events.description: beginning to ascend the wooden stairs leading to the temple entrance
entering the wooden temple interior from the outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone courtyard and climbing the wooden stairs toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: large traditional wooden structure with red pillars and dark roof
tall slender evergreen tree beside the temple entrance
irregular stone paving covering the ground area
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation in the background
weathered wooden steps leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit stone courtyard before a traditional wooden mountain temple. The camera moves forward across the cobblestones, passing a tall cypress tree, and begins ascending the wooden stairs leading to the dark temple entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden temple corridor with columns and dramatic backlighting

events.description: transitioning from bright sunlight to dim interior illuminated by strong backlight from the far exit
approaching the intensely bright exit at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden corridor toward the bright light at the far end

entered.detail: thick wooden support columns lining both sides of the corridor
decorative wooden lattice panels set into the corridor walls
intensely bright doorway at the end of the corridor creating strong light rays

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the camera moves through a narrow wooden corridor supported by thick pillars. Dramatic light rays stream through lattice windows as the camera approaches an intensely bright exit at the far end, creating a strong contrast between the dim interior and the blinding outdoor light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air courtyard into the dramatic, shadowed interior of a mountain sanctuary. It begins by gliding across sunlit cobblestones past a tall cypress tree, moving steadily toward the traditional wooden temple. As the camera ascends the wooden stairs, the scene shifts abruptly from the brilliance of the outdoors into a dim, narrow corridor supported by thick pillars. The movement continues through this shadowed space, where sharp rays of light stream through lattice windows, before finally drawing toward an intensely bright exit that creates a blinding contrast at the far end of the hall.
